title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-3C Classification-Only Shared-Router Integration

changes.new:
if normalized_message.lstrip().startswith("/"):
        return _pass_through_result(normalized_surface, slash_rid, "SK-PASS-SLASH-COMMAND")

    # FOXAI_CURRENT_STATE_CLASSIFICATION_V1B3C_BEGIN
    _v1b3c_packet = None
    try:
        import importlib.util as _v1b3c_importlib_util
        import sys as _v1b3c_sys

        _v1b3c_module = globals().get("_FOXAI_V1B3C_BROKER_MODULE")
        if _v1b3c_module is None:
            _v1b3c_path = Path(__file__).resolve().with_name("current_state_request_broker_v1.py")
            _v1b3c_spec = _v1b3c_importlib_util.spec_from_file_location(
                "foxai_current_state_request_broker_v1",
                _v1b3c_path,
            )
            if _v1b3c_spec is None or _v1b3c_spec.loader is None:
                raise RuntimeError("current_state_broker_loader_unavailable")
            _v1b3c_module = _v1b3c_importlib_util.module_from_spec(_v1b3c_spec)
            _v1b3c_sys.modules[_v1b3c_spec.name] = _v1b3c_module
            try:
                _v1b3c_spec.loader.exec_module(_v1b3c_module)
            except Exception:
                _v1b3c_sys.modules.pop(_v1b3c_spec.name, None)
                raise
            globals()["_FOXAI_V1B3C_BROKER_MODULE"] = _v1b3c_module

        _v1b3c_packet = _v1b3c_module.broker_request(
            normalized_message,
            authorization=None,
            providers={},
            request_context={
                "surface": normalized_surface,
                "request_id": slash_rid,
                "integration_mode": "classification_only",
            },
        )
    except Exception:
        _v1b3c_packet = None

    if isinstance(_v1b3c_packet, dict):
        _v1b3c_status = str(_v1b3c_packet.get("status") or "")
        _v1b3c_intercept_statuses = {
            "authorization_required",
            "provider_unavailable",
            "unsupported_live_category",
            "provider_scope_mismatch",
            "provider_error_safe_passthrough",
        }
        _v1b3c_intercept = _v1b3c_status in _v1b3c_intercept_statuses
        if _v1b3c_status == "unsupported_live_category":
            _v1b3c_text = normalized_message.casefold()
            _v1b3c_strong_live_cues = (
                "right now",
                "at this moment",
                " is running",
                " are running",
                " is open",
                " are open",
                " is connected",
                " are connected",
                " is listening",
                " are listening",
            )
            _v1b3c_intercept = any(cue in _v1b3c_text for cue in _v1b3c_strong_live_cues)

        if _v1b3c_intercept:
            _v1b3c_category = str(_v1b3c_packet.get("category") or "unspecified")
            _v1b3c_lead = {
                "authorization_required": (
                    "This is a current-state request, but explicit read-only authorization "
                    "is required before a future approved provider may be used."
                ),
                "provider_unavailable": (
                    "This is a current-state request, but no bounded approved read-only "
                    "provider is available for the requested category."
                ),
                "unsupported_live_category": (
                    "This is a current-state request, but its live evidence category is not "
                    "supported by the approved broker contract."
                ),
                "provider_scope_mismatch": (
                    "This current-state request is outside the approved provider or category scope."
                ),
                "provider_error_safe_passthrough": (
                    "The current-state provider path failed safely and supplied no live evidence."
                ),
            }[_v1b3c_status]
            _v1b3c_answer = (
                "CURRENT-STATE CLASSIFICATION ONLY\n\n"
                + _v1b3c_lead
                + "\n\nCategory: "
                + _v1b3c_category
                + "\nStatus: "
                + _v1b3c_status
                + "\n\nV1B-3C connected no live provider and performed no live inspection, "
                "scan, model call, diagnosis, repair, optimization, or recommendation. "
                "No current-state measurement is claimed."
            )
            _v1b3c_answer_packet = dict(_v1b3c_packet)
            _v1b3c_answer_packet.update(
                {
                    "integration_id": "classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c",
                    "integration_mode": "classification_only",
                    "answer_text": _v1b3c_answer,
                    "authorization_supplied": False,
                    "provider_registry_supplied": False,
                    "provider_invoked": False,
                    "live_inspection_performed": False,
                    "live_scan_performed": False,
                    "model_call_performed": False,
                    "diagnosis_performed": False,
                    "repair_performed": False,
                    "optimization_performed": False,
                    "recommendation_performed": False,
                    "current_state_claimed": False,
                }
            )
            _v1b3c_result = _pass_through_result(
                normalized_surface,
                slash_rid,
                "V1B-3C classification-only current-state boundary",
            )
            _v1b3c_result.update(
                {
                    "handled": True,
                    "status": _v1b3c_status,
                    "model_bypass": True,
                    "ordinary_chat_pass_through": False,
                    "answer_text": _v1b3c_answer,
                    "answer_packet": _v1b3c_answer_packet,
                    "diagnostic": "V1B-3C classification-only current-state boundary",
                }
            )
            return _v1b3c_result
    # FOXAI_CURRENT_STATE_CLASSIFICATION_V1B3C_END

    try:
        normalized_selectors = _normalize_selectors(selectors)

  "target_before_sha256": "1563a0f3275eb7516006c8f608ef595f693a85fcb9cba60f2610ca053b25f275",

    "after_line": 544,
    "before_line": 547,
    "slash_precedence_preserved": true,

  },
  "broker": {
    "path": "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\current_state_request_broker_v1.py",
    "sha256": "9ae4812e63d080e533bec97c6fd7d870bea04f96a1eba7ab578bc441a065a676",
    "authorization_argument": null,
    "providers_argument": {},
    "provider_count": 0
  },
  "intercept_statuses": [
    "authorization_required",
    "provider_unavailable",
    "unsupported_live_category",
    "provider_scope_mismatch",
    "provider_error_safe_passthrough"
  ],
  "preserved_statuses": [
    "not_applicable",
    "historical_route_preserved",
    "slash_command_bypass",
    "ambiguous_request",
    "disallowed_intent"
  ],
  "unsupported_category_guard": "Only strong explicit live cues are intercepted when the broker category is absent; bare current/currently architecture wording continues to the proven historical self-knowledge route.",
  "answer_behavior": {
    "handled": true,
    "model_bypass": true,
    "ordinary_chat_pass_through": false,
    "classification_only_label_required": true,
    "current_state_claimed": false
  },
  "excluded": {
    "live_provider": true,
    "live_inspection": true,
    "scans": true,
    "process_or_service_or_listener_queries": true,
    "network": true,
    "model_calls": true,
    "diagnosis": true,
    "repair": true,
    "optimization": true,
    "recommendations": true
  }
}

# Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-3C

Mission: `ENG-20260723-031118-BF49AE`

This mission integrates the already installed V1B-3A current-state request broker into
the canonical shared chat adapter in classification-only mode. The confirmed seam is
after the adapter's exact slash-command bypass and before selector normalization.

## Behavior

- Slash commands still pass through first.
- The broker is called with `authorization=None` and `providers={}`.
- Recognized current-state requests receive a clearly labeled non-execution answer.
- Historical/resource, unrelated, ambiguous, and disallowed requests continue through
  the existing proven adapter route.
- Unsupported-category interception requires a strong explicit live cue so phrases such
  as “which Python currently runs Workshop Main?” remain historical self-knowledge.

## Safety boundary

No live provider is connected. No live inspection, scan, process/service/listener query,
network access, model call, diagnosis, repair, optimization, recommendation, install,
service/startup/registry change, K: access, move, rename, or deletion occurs. No
current-state measurement is claimed.

validations.name: Verify R2 classification-only interception, canonical adapter envelope, and preserved slash, historical, architecture, advisory, repair, and ordinary routes
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys
path=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_v1b3c_adapter_test",path); assert spec and spec.loader
module=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); sys.modules[spec.name]=module; spec.loader.exec_module(module)
def route(message,surface="webui",rid="V1B3C-TEST"):
 return module.route_message(message,surface,rid,{})
def integrated(result,status):
 assert result["handled"] is True
 assert isinstance(result.get("schema"),str) and result["schema"]
 assert isinstance(result.get("adapter_id"),str) and result["adapter_id"]
 assert isinstance(result.get("adapter_version"),str) and result["adapter_version"]
 assert result["status"]==status
 assert result["model_bypass"] is True
 assert result["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is False
 packet=result["answer_packet"]
 assert packet["integration_id"]=="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
 assert packet["integration_mode"]=="classification_only"
 assert packet["execution_performed"] is False
 assert packet["provider_invoked"] is False
 assert packet["live_inspection_performed"] is False
 assert packet["live_scan_performed"] is False
 assert packet["current_state_claimed"] is False
 assert "CURRENT-STATE CLASSIFICATION ONLY" in result["answer_text"]
 assert "No current-state measurement is claimed" in result["answer_text"]
for surface in ("webui","desktop"):
 integrated(route("How much memory is available right now?",surface),"authorization_required")
 integrated(route("Which services are running right now?",surface),"authorization_required")
 integrated(route("What is my battery health right now?",surface),"unsupported_live_category")
 slash=route("/engineer workshop status",surface)
 assert slash["status"]=="pass_through" and slash["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is True
 assert not slash.get("answer_packet")
 historical=route("What did the saved resource report say about RAM?",surface)
 assert (historical.get("answer_packet") or {}).get("integration_id")!="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
 architecture=route("Which Python currently runs Workshop Main?",surface)
 assert (architecture.get("answer_packet") or {}).get("integration_id")!="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
 unrelated=route("Write a poem about foxes.",surface)
 assert (unrelated.get("answer_packet") or {}).get("integration_id")!="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
 advisory=route("Is Chrome using too much memory right now?",surface)
 assert (advisory.get("answer_packet") or {}).get("integration_id")!="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
 repair=route("Fix whatever process is using my RAM right now.",surface)
 assert (repair.get("answer_packet") or {}).get("integration_id")!="classification_only_shared_router_v1b3c"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3C_CLASSIFICATION_ROUTES_OK")

validations.name: Verify deterministic shared-router results on WebUI and Desktop surfaces
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys,json
path=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_v1b3c_determinism",path); assert spec and spec.loader
module=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); sys.modules[spec.name]=module; spec.loader.exec_module(module)
def canonical(value): return json.dumps(value,sort_keys=True,separators=(",",":"),ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8")
for surface in ("webui","desktop"):
 for message in ("How much RAM is available now?","What is my battery health right now?","Which Python currently runs Workshop Main?","Write a poem about foxes."):
  first=module.route_message(message,surface,"V1B3C-DETERMINISTIC",{})
  second=module.route_message(message,surface,"V1B3C-DETERMINISTIC",{})
  assert canonical(first)==canonical(second),(surface,message)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3C_DETERMINISM_OK")

validations.name: Verify unchanged V1B-3A broker classification-only mode with zero providers
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys,hashlib
path=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\current_state_request_broker_v1.py")
data=path.read_bytes(); assert len(data)==23308 and hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()=="9ae4812e63d080e533bec97c6fd7d870bea04f96a1eba7ab578bc441a065a676"
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_v1b3c_broker_verify",path); assert spec and spec.loader
module=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); sys.modules[spec.name]=module; spec.loader.exec_module(module)
cases={
 "How much memory is available right now?":"authorization_required",
 "Which services are running right now?":"authorization_required",
 "What is my battery health right now?":"unsupported_live_category",
 "What did the saved resource report say about RAM?":"historical_route_preserved",
 "/engineer workshop status":"slash_command_bypass",
 "Write a poem about foxes.":"not_applicable",
 "How is my computer doing?":"ambiguous_request",
 "Fix whatever process is using my RAM right now.":"disallowed_intent",
}
for text,status in cases.items():
 result=module.broker_request(text,authorization=None,providers={},request_context={"integration_mode":"classification_only"})
 assert result["status"]==status,(text,result["status"],status)
 assert result["execution_performed"] is False
 assert result["live_evidence"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3C_BROKER_CLASSIFICATION_ONLY_OK")

validations.name: Verify exact precedence and static no-scan no-provider safety boundary
argv:
from pathlib import Path
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
begin=source.index("    # FOXAI_CURRENT_STATE_CLASSIFICATION_V1B3C_BEGIN\n")
end=source.index("    # FOXAI_CURRENT_STATE_CLASSIFICATION_V1B3C_END\n",begin)
block=source[begin:end]
required=["authorization=None","providers={}","classification_only","provider_invoked","current_state_claimed"]
for item in required: assert item in block,item
for forbidden in ["subprocess","psutil","socket","urllib","winreg","os.system","Popen(","run(","check_output","netstat","Get-Process","Get-Service"]:
 assert forbidden not in block,forbidden
slash=source.index('    if normalized_message.lstrip().startswith("/"):\n')
assert slash < begin
selector=source.index("    try:\n        normalized_selectors = _normalize_selectors(selectors)",end)
assert end < selector
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3C_STATIC_SAFETY_AND_PRECEDENCE_OK")

validations.name: Verify practical snapshot captured the exact adapter preimage and add-only support paths
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260723-031118-BF49AE")
manifests=sorted(root.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
expected=[
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/CURRENT_STATE_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B3C.md",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py",
]
rows=manifest["entries"]
assert sorted(row["relative_path"] for row in rows)==expected
adapter=next(row for row in rows if row["relative_path"].endswith("self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py"))
assert adapter["existed"] is True
assert adapter["sha256"]=="1563a0f3275eb7516006c8f608ef595f693a85fcb9cba60f2610ca053b25f275"
for row in rows:
 if row["relative_path"].endswith("CURRENT_STATE_SHARED_ROUTER_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json") or row["relative_path"].endswith("README_V1B3C.md"):
  assert row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B3C_SNAPSHOT_OK")
